---
id: join-subdevice
title: "开始子设备入网"
description: "调用本接口，可使 Zigbee 或 Matter 网关进入子设备配网模式，便于与子设备完成配对。"
sidebar_label: "开始子设备入网"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"开始子设备入网"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/gateways/subdevices/join"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



调用本接口，可使 Zigbee 或 Matter 网关进入子设备配网模式，便于与子设备完成配对。

:::tip
在开始之前，请确保子设备已处于配网模式。
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["gatewayId","commandCode"],"properties":{"gatewayId":{"type":"string","description":"网关设备ID"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","enum":["APIEnableSubdeviceJoining","APIBindBleDeviceToHub","APIPushMatterBindInfo"],"description":"入网命令编码：\n- APIEnableSubdeviceJoining: 标准 Zigbee 设备入网（例如通过按键触发入网模式）\n- APIBindBleDeviceToHub: 基于 MagicPair 技术完成 Zigbee 设备入网\n- APIPushMatterBindInfo: Matter 设备入网\n"},"data":{"type":"object","description":"入网参数（JSON 对象），根据不同的 commandCode，需传入的参数说明如下：\n- APIEnableSubdeviceJoining: 无需传入此字段。\n- APIBindBleDeviceToHub: 必填，数据结构为：{\"shortAddr\":65534,\"mac\":\"54EF4410003604C9\",\"manufacturerCode\":4447,\"fwVer\":\"0.0.0_0030\",\"model\":\"lumi.light.acn014\",\"did\":\"lumi.54ef4410003604c9\",\"devType\":142,\"hdVer\":1,\"zbVer\":\"3\",\"pid\":\"lumi1.54ef442dcd15\"}，\n- APIPushMatterBindInfo: 必填，数据结构为：{\"code\":\"子设备 的 11 位 Matter 配对码\"}\n"}},"title":"SubdeviceJoinRequest"},"examples":{"zigbeeJoin":{"summary":"标准 Zigbee 设备入网（如三击入网）","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIEnableSubdeviceJoining"}},"magicpairJoin":{"summary":"基于 MagicPair 技术完成 Zigbee 设备入网","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIBindBleDeviceToHub","data":{"shortAddr":65534,"mac":"54EF4410003604C9","manufacturerCode":4447,"fwVer":"0.0.0_0030","model":"lumi.light.acn014","did":"lumi.54ef4410003604c9","devType":142,"hdVer":1,"zbVer":"3","pid":"lumi1.54ef442dcd15"}}},"matterJoin":{"summary":"Matter 设备入网","value":{"gatewayId":"gateway001","commandCode":"APIPushMatterBindInfo","data":{"code":"04036408297"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
